qa_pairs.question: Which apartments have at most 6 bedrooms?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
WHERE apartments.bedroom_count <= 6
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which apartments entities with bedroom count at most '6'?

qa_pairs.question: Which apartments have at least 2 bathrooms?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT apartments.apt_id FROM apartments
WHERE apartments.bathroom_count >= 2
